output: TechCorp FY2023 analysis: Segments – Consumer Electronics (55% revenue, 15% margin), Enterprise Solutions (30% revenue, 20% margin), Services & Support (15% revenue, 16% margin). Gross margins: 38%, 45.5%, 60%. Operating margins: 15%, 20%, 15.7%. EBITDA margins: 18.5%, 23.4%, 18%. ROICs: 12.3%, 14.8%, 10.5%. Free cash flow: $1.8B, $1.2B, $0.6B respectively. Benchmarking shows Enterprise Solutions outperforms peers by ~4‑5% in margins; Services & Support has highest gross margin but lower ROIC due to capital intensity. Qualitative drivers: consumer shift to mid‑tier devices, cloud migration, subscription growth. Risks: supply chain, privacy regulations. Overall recommendation: Buy with 12% upside target over next 12–18 months, supported by strong segment performance and solid cash generation.
